author: Carlos
description: Bring Obsidian tasks together with Apple Reminders, Apple Calendar on macOS. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Carlos
manifest.description: Redesign task management around a focused workspace for Markdown tasks, external reminders, calendars, tags, filters, and daily planning.
manifest.name: Task Hub

name: Task Hub

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.3.16 adds recurring task support and makes supported external repeat fields editable.

Highlights:
- Add task recurrence parsing, editing, creation, and completion rollover.
- Add recurring event creation with explicit repeat start and end dates, expanded into concrete Apple Calendar events.
- Enable repeat editing for writable Apple Reminders, Dida tasks, and Apple Calendar events from calendar details.
- Keep read-only sources display-only instead of showing disabled repeat controls.
- Fix tag suggestion overlay and refresh the Obsidian source logo.

Verification:
- node node_modules/.bin/jest --runInBand
- node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit
- node esbuild.config.mjs production
- node scripts/smoke-plugin-runtime.cjs
- node scripts/build-apple-helper.cjs
- node scripts/prepare-release-assets.cjs
releases.name: Task Hub 0.3.16

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.3.15 improves the task detail send flow.

- Replaces separate send buttons with a single Send to action and active destination picker.
- Adds a configurable default send destination for Apple Reminders and Dida/TickTick.
- Moves task completion into a title-row checkbox and cleans up the detail action area.
- Fixes destination menu clipping, alignment, and rounded-corner consistency.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description: Task Hub 0.3.13 adds the unscheduled-task calendar side panel with drag scheduling, including multi-select drag support, and fixes Dida/TickTick completion and date round-trip issues in calendar workflows.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.3.12

- Add a live +N overflow indicator for hidden calendar items in month day cells and week/day all-day slots.
- The count updates while scrolling and hides when all lower items are exposed.

Verified with npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build, npm run smoke, and npm run release:assets.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.3.11

- Allow dragging the visible representative task from overlapped timed-task stacks.
- Keep multi-selected timed calendar moves relative to the dragged anchor and clamp out-of-day moves to the day boundary.

Verified with npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build, npm run smoke, and npm run release:assets.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description: Task Hub 0.3.10 adds multi-select bulk task movement across list and calendar views, including aligned stacked drag feedback, exact-drop rescheduling, and common-action context menus with delete support.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Highlights

- Updates the Obsidian marketplace-facing manifest description to mention vault tasks, Apple Reminders, Apple Calendar, and Dida/TickTick in one workspace.
- Updates the English and Chinese README introductions so the plugin listing reflects the current external-source scope.

## Verification

- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
releases.name: Task Hub 0.3.9

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Highlights

- Adds Dida/TickTick as a first-class external task source through the Open API.
- Supports Dida task read, create, edit, complete/reopen, delete, drag reschedule, list colors, inbox sync, and native tag sync.
- Adds external source support matrices to the English and Chinese README files.
- Keeps Apple Reminder alarm support from 0.3.7 while separating Dida native tags from Apple Reminder hashtag normalization.

## Verification

- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
- Real Dida API create/read/delete spike for native tags
releases.name: Task Hub 0.3.8

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.3.7

- Add Apple Reminders alarm support for timed task creation and editing.
- Align create/edit date, time, and reminder controls; enabling reminder without a time now defaults the time to 09:00, while disabling reminder keeps the time unchanged.
- Align month-view task and event color bars.
- Add regression coverage for reminder alarms, layout CSS, helper migration, and calendar/task detail flows.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.3.6

- Restore linked-note creation as a Task Hub modal while keeping Obsidian's native Markdown editor and editor plugins.
- Add explicit Save note and Cancel controls for new linked notes; cancelling or closing an unsaved creation deletes the draft file.
- Hide linked-note YAML/frontmatter metadata by default, with a setting to show it when needed.
- Preserve and test Thino multi-file metadata, including the 14-digit Thino id.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.3.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: - Add day/week calendar vertical scale controls with a fit overview mode.\n- Refine dense month and fit-mode calendar rows to match Apple Calendar-style content rows.\n- Keep compact source color markers aligned with event text and reduce wheel zoom sensitivity.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.3.4

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- Harden linked note editing so empty note bodies are treated as cancelled notes and deleted instead of saved.
- Render linked note bodies through Obsidian Markdown preview while preserving Task Hub tag styling.
- Improve tag completion in the note editor textarea and keep suggestions anchored near the cursor.
- Keep linked notes title-free on creation so new notes start with an empty body.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
- Synced main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css to the test vault and verified with cmp -s

## Note
The GitHub git transport was unavailable from this environment during publish, so the release branch and tag were created through the GitHub Git Database API.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes
- Add task and calendar event linked notes backed by Markdown frontmatter.
- Show related note content in task/event details with note counts on task rows.
- Add modal note editing, note deletion, and a three-dot note card menu.
- Add Thino multi-file-compatible note creation with explicit single-file, Canvas, and diary scope limits.
- Preserve linked note relationships when vault tasks are sent to Apple Reminders.
- Document task notes in English and Chinese READMEs.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
- Synced main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css to the test vault and verified with cmp -s
releases.name: Task Hub 0.2.27

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.2.23

- Make Apple Reminders task details editable from the task list, including title, date, tags, and list.
- Default vault-to-Apple Reminders tag transfer on and read Apple Reminder hashtags back as task tags.
- Add task-list right-click delete action.
- Tighten task detail layout, keep action buttons on one row, and avoid horizontal scrollbars.

Verification:
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## What's changed
- Add Apple Calendar and Apple Reminders conversion from the calendar context menu.
- Preserve timed Markdown task start times when sending tasks to Apple Reminders.
- Keep read-only Apple calendars such as birthdays and holidays display-only, with no edit/delete/convert actions.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- Added high-contrast selected styling for calendar tasks and events after left-click or right-click.
- Multi-day events now select all rendered day fragments together.
- Selection uses each item/source color while keeping title and time text readable.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

Note: taskhub-apple-helper is included as an optional local macOS integration asset; Obsidian community plugin installs still rely on manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.2.10

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- Calendar items now open a lightweight detail popover on left click instead of jumping away from the calendar.
- Added editable details for vault tasks, Apple Reminders, and Apple Calendar events.
- Kept ICS events read-only with source details and URL access.
- Added source badges for Apple and vault items, plus cleaner all-day event layout.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

Note: taskhub-apple-helper is included as an optional local macOS integration asset; Obsidian community plugin installs still rely on manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.2.9

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.2.8 improves calendar creation and local Apple editing.

- Separates task creation from Apple Calendar event creation targets.
- Adds event duration controls and defaults month-view creation to 09:00.
- Keeps Apple Reminders and vault tasks as time-point items instead of event-length blocks.
- Adds right-click deletion for supported calendar items.
- Fixes Apple Calendar deletion by resolving EventKit event identifiers before falling back to calendar item identifiers.

Verified with npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build, npm run smoke, and npm run release:assets.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.2.8

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description: Task Hub 0.2.7 improves day/week timeline editing. Timed tasks and Apple items can be moved with pointer-aware drag offsets, resize feedback uses the snapped committed delta, overlapping timed items are split into columns, and drag delta feedback now follows the dragged item with stronger contrast. Release assets include the standard Obsidian plugin files plus the optional local Apple helper for manual/local integration.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.2.6 focuses on timeline drag precision for Apple Calendar and Apple Reminders.

Changes:
- Adds day/week timeline resize handles for timed items.
- Shows live +/- minute feedback while resizing, snapped to 15-minute increments.
- Commits the last visible snapped resize target instead of recalculating from dragend coordinates, preventing the displayed delta from jumping on mouse release.
- Preserves Apple Reminder display duration locally while writing start times to Apple Reminders dueDateComponents.hour/minute.

Verification:
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.2.5 improves Apple Calendar support and month-view behavior.

- Split Apple Calendar into per-calendar layers with source colors.
- Added refresh feedback for local Apple sync.
- Render multi-day events as daily clipped cards with a cross-day marker instead of spanning overlays.
- Fixed Apple all-day ISO events losing the final day.
- Highlight the Today button when the current day/week/month range contains today.

Verified with npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build, npm run smoke, and npm run release:assets.

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- Keep Chinese task detail actions readable in narrow panes with a stable 2+1 button layout.
- Render all week/day all-day items inside a scrollable slot instead of truncating them behind +more.

## Verification
- npm test -- --runInBand
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- Improve settings layout spacing and responsive two-column presentation.
- Add optional Chinese lunar calendar labels in month view.
- Align calendar title with a theme-accent marker.
- Improve English/Chinese task detail action button layouts.
- Block Local Apple Calendar and Reminders features on unsupported non-macOS systems.

## Verification
- npm test -- --runInBand
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.2.2 adds explicit Apple send flows for calendar tasks.

- Right-click dated vault tasks in the calendar to send them to Apple Calendar events or Apple Reminders when the matching setting is enabled.
- Adds risk confirmation before enabling send flows that remove source Markdown tasks after successful Apple creation.
- Deletes source Markdown task lines only after Apple Calendar/Reminders creation succeeds and the source line still matches safely.
- Improves task detail action layout so Apple send actions do not overflow narrow panes.

Verified with npm test, npm run typecheck, npm run build, npm run smoke, and npm run release:assets.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.2.2

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.2.1 adds Apple Reminders as a calendar task creation destination. When Local Apple Reminders creation is enabled, the calendar create-task modal can target a Reminders list, and Task Hub can read reminder lists plus move existing reminders between lists from task details.

This release also includes the opt-in Apple Calendar drag-to-reschedule support from the current branch: month, week, and day calendar event drags preserve time, duration, and all-day state.

Verification: npm test; npm run typecheck; npm run build; npm run smoke; npm run release:assets.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.2.1

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.1.15 adds opt-in Apple Calendar drag-to-reschedule support. Calendar event cards can be dragged to another day in month, week, and day views when Apple Calendar writeback is enabled, while preserving the event time, duration, and all-day state.

This release also fixes EventKit event lookup for real Apple Calendar writes and updates the iCloud Reminders/Calendar documentation.

Verification: npm test; npm run typecheck; npm run build; npm run smoke; npm run release:assets.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.15

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- Add drag-and-drop rescheduling for dated vault Markdown tasks in calendar views.
- Add Apple Reminders due-date rescheduling when Reminders writeback is enabled.
- Preserve Apple Reminder local date keys without UTC day drift.

## Notes
- Apple Calendar and public ICS events remain read-only in this release.
- Apple Calendar drag editing is planned for a later design pass.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.14

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## What's new
- Add calendar click-to-create for dated vault tasks, configurable from settings.
- Expand week start settings to every weekday.
- Keep month view scoped to the current month while aligning by the configured week start.
- Add localized calendar period titles.
- Fix month day cards to a stable height with internal scrolling for dense task days.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
- git diff --check
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.13

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## Changes
- External Apple Reminders tasks can now use the detail panel Open source action.
- Apple Reminders source opening prefers an exact external URL when available and falls back to opening the Reminders app on macOS.
- Release metadata is synchronized at 0.1.12.

## Verification
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run release:assets
- npm run smoke
- npm run check:apple-helper
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.12

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
- Show missing parent tasks as context rows in tag cards when only nested child tasks match the card tag.
- Render other same-line task tags in tag cards without duplicating the active card tag.
- Preserve nested task indentation in the tags view.
- Improve tag chip layout for wrapped long task titles.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.11

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## What is new

- Render task-line tags as gradient chips in task cards.
- Keep task cards scoped to tags written on the same task line, avoiding repeated file-level metadata tags on every task.
- Display escaped Markdown punctuation such as \* as plain text in task titles.

## Verification

- node ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand
- ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
- node esbuild.config.mjs production
- node scripts/smoke-plugin-runtime.cjs
- node scripts/build-apple-helper.cjs && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/prepare-release-assets.cjs

Note: taskhub-apple-helper is included as an optional local/developer asset for Local Apple integration; standard Obsidian community plugin installs use main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.10

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## What is new

- Include Obsidian file-level tags on indexed vault tasks, so Tasks cards, task details, filters, and the Tags view all show the same tag data.

## Verification

- node ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand
- ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
- node esbuild.config.mjs production
- node scripts/smoke-plugin-runtime.cjs
- node scripts/build-apple-helper.cjs && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/prepare-release-assets.cjs

Note: taskhub-apple-helper is included as an optional local/developer asset for Local Apple integration; standard Obsidian community plugin installs use main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.9

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## What is new

- Satisfy Obsidian community review blockers for command IDs, settings headings, unload behavior, async callbacks, and promise handling.
- Add a custom Task Hub ribbon logo for the Obsidian sidebar.
- Fix Tags view task-card alignment so source markers line up with their task rows.

## Verification

- node ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand
- ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit
- node esbuild.config.mjs production
- node scripts/smoke-plugin-runtime.cjs
- node scripts/build-apple-helper.cjs && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/prepare-release-assets.cjs

Note: taskhub-apple-helper is included as an optional local/developer asset for Local Apple integration; standard Obsidian community plugin installs use main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.8

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
## What's new

- Add explicit export from vault Markdown tasks to Apple Reminders.
- Trigger export from the editor context menu, the command palette, user-assigned hotkeys, or Task Hub task details.
- Keep reminder creation behind a separate Local Apple setting and re-check the source task line before creating the Apple Reminder.
- Store created reminder identifiers in plugin data to prevent duplicate sends.

## Verification

- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run build:apple-helper
- npm run check:apple-helper

Note: taskhub-apple-helper is included as an optional local/developer asset for Local Apple integration; standard Obsidian community plugin installs use main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.7

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.1.6

- Make tag cards fixed-height in the Tags view.
- Add drag-and-drop reordering for tag cards, with saved order across reloads.
- Keep parent tag cards aggregating nested tag tasks while preserving exact child cards.

Verification:
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.6

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.1.5

- Preserve the task list scroll position when completing or reopening tasks.
- Add regression coverage for restoring the task list pane scroll offset after rendering.

Verification:
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.5

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.1.4

- Redesigned the task toolbar so search applies only on Enter or the Search button.
- Added an explicit condition filter panel for tag, date, and text matching with AND/OR mode.
- Kept the task search/filter controls compact and right-aligned in the toolbar.
- Updated task source coloring and tag/task counts to respect visible completed-task filtering.

Verification:
- npm test
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build
- npm run smoke
- npm run release:assets
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.4

releases.author: saralaaga
releases.description:
Task Hub 0.1.0 is the first packaged release for Obsidian desktop.

Highlights:
- Gather vault Markdown tasks into task, calendar, and tag views.
- Jump from a task back to its source note.
- Complete vault tasks safely after source-line verification.
- Browse dated tasks in day, week, and month calendar views.
- Use searchable multi-select tag filtering and waterfall-style tag summaries.
- Sync read-only public ICS calendars.
- Support local Apple Reminders and Apple Calendar on macOS desktop, with optional Apple Reminders completion writeback.
- Switch between English and Chinese UI in settings.

Obsidian release assets included: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.

Note: Apple helper distribution is still treated as a local/developer capability and is not included in the standard Obsidian community plugin asset set.
releases.name: Task Hub 0.1.0
